scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.//postinstall: Applies the Next.js 16.2.6 workStore fix via a custom Node script (no external binary). The script uses require.resolve('next/package.json') from frontend/scripts/, which walks the standard Node module-resolution chain and finds `next` regardless of whether npm hoists it to <repo>/node_modules (workspace install — local and Vercel-with-vercel.json) or installs it locally at frontend/node_modules (Vercel-with-RootDir=frontend). patch-package was removed because (a) its binary lives in devDependencies which Vercel's prod install omits, surfacing as `patch-package: command not found` (exit 127), and (b) it resolves <cwd>/node_modules/<pkg> only and silently fails when npm hoisting puts the package elsewhere.
